text:
Mengyun Jin
Mengyun Jin is a Language Lecturer of Chinese at NYU Shanghai where she teaches in both the Elementary and Intermediate levels. Prior to joining NYU Shanghai, she worked in New Zealand at the Confucius Institute in Auckland as a volunteer Chinese instructor. While there, she was awarded the honor of Excellent Volunteer Chinese Instructor. From 2017 to 2018, Mengyun also worked at the Council on International Education Exchange in Shanghai where she taught undergraduate and high school students from the US.

text_blocks.text: Mengyun Jin is a Language Lecturer of Chinese at NYU Shanghai where she teaches in both the Elementary and Intermediate levels. Prior to joining NYU Shanghai, she worked in New Zealand at the Confucius Institute in Auckland as a volunteer Chinese instructor. While there, she was awarded the honor of Excellent Volunteer Chinese Instructor. From 2017 to 2018, Mengyun also worked at the Council on International Education Exchange in Shanghai where she taught undergraduate and high school students from the US.
